content: I'm still trying to process everything that happened on my sabbatical. I feel like I learned so much about myself and my relationships.
That sounds like an incredible experience, Jules. What were some of the highlights of your trip, and what did you learn about yourself?

Well, I spent a lot of time traveling through Eastern Europe, and I was struck by the beauty and history of the region. I also had a lot of time to reflect on my relationships and priorities. I realized that I need to make more time for my loved ones and focus on what's truly important to me.

That's a wonderful insight, Jules. It's great that you were able to take the time to reflect and recharge. What are your plans now that you're back, and how do you plan to prioritize your relationships?

I'm planning on spending more time with my family and friends, and I'm also looking forward to getting back into my work as an Interior Designer. I've been thinking about starting a travel blog to document my experiences and share them with others.
That sounds like a great idea, Jules. You have a lot of interesting stories and experiences to share. What inspired you to start a travel blog, and what do you hope to achieve with it?

I think it would be a great way to connect with others who share my passions and interests. I've always loved writing and photography, and I think this would be a great way to combine those skills with my love of travel.

That makes sense. It's always exciting to start a new project and share your passions with others. Do you have any specific plans or goals for your blog, such as a certain number of posts per week or a specific focus?

I'm thinking of posting at least once a week, and I'd like to focus on sharing my experiences and tips for traveling in Eastern Europe. I'd also like to share some of my favorite recipes and cooking techniques that I learned on my trip.

That sounds like a great plan, Jules. I'm sure your readers will love hearing about your experiences and learning from your expertise. What's your favorite type of cuisine, and are there any specific dishes that you're excited to share?
I love Thai food, and I've been experimenting with different recipes and cooking techniques. I'm excited to share some of my favorite dishes with my readers and hear their feedback and suggestions.
